matches.match_rationale: Ledger data does not map cleanly to sponsor-mandated schemas. AI-assisted ETL can apply field mapping rules.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A transformation layer applying per-sponsor mapping rules to produce ready-to-submit reports.

matches.match_rationale: Sponsors requiring narrative compliance fields are common. LLM-based generation can draft these.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A report drafting assistant generating compliant narrative sections for human review.

matches.match_rationale: The full sponsor reporting workflow is a multi-step process consuming 25-40 hrs/month.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An automated reporting agent that assembles draft reports, surfaces reconciliation discrepancies, and maintains version history.

matches.match_rationale: Pre-submission validation can flag statistical outliers in disbursement data before report generation.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A pre-submission validation layer scoring each report draft for data anomalies.
